name: PER_TASKS_IN_CHECKLIST_TL
description: PER_TASKS_IN_CHECKLIST_TL holds translated information for Checklist Templates.

columns.Name: TASK_IN_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: NOTE_TITLE
columns.Comments: Stores title for notes section

columns.Name: LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANG
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the contents of the translatable columns were originally created.

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_TASK_NAME
columns.Comments: Translated name of Checklist Template Task

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Translated description of Checklist Template Task

columns.Name: ACTION_URL
columns.Comments: Translated Action URL of Checklist Template Task

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: COMPLETE_ACTION_LABEL
columns.Comments: COMPLETE_ACTION_LABEL

columns.Name: REJECT_ACTION_LABEL
columns.Comments: REJECT_ACTION_LABEL

columns.Name: SAVE_ACTION_LABEL
columns.Comments: SAVE_ACTION_LABEL

columns.Name: CALENDAR_ACTION_LABEL
columns.Comments: CALENDAR_ACTION_LABEL

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ACTION1_LABEL
columns.Comments: ACTIVITY_ACTION1_LABEL

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ACTION2_LABEL
columns.Comments: ACTIVITY_ACTION2_LABEL

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ACTION3_LABEL
columns.Comments: ACTIVITY_ACTION3_LABEL

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ACTION4_LABEL
columns.Comments: ACTIVITY_ACTION4_LABEL

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ACTION5_LABEL
columns.Comments: ACTIVITY_ACTION5_LABEL

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: USER_DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: USER_DISPLAY_NAME

columns.Name: TASK_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Task Details (Rich Details)

columns.Name: MEETING_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Meeting Location for task type meeting

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
